---
title: "Week 10 Announcements"
format: gfm
---

Hi, everyone:

With logistic regression and maximum likelihood estimation in hand, we are ready to bridge into the final set of models for the course. I hope the connections between confusion matrices and asymmetric loss are especially helpful this week.

I will not have regularly scheduled office hours this week. That said, please don't hesitate to ask for help!

-Marc
